title: Intermediate Ruby on Rails Backend Developer
description: Intermediate Ruby on Rails Backend Developer — Job Description
Position Overview
We are seeking an experienced Intermediate Ruby on Rails Backend Developer to join our engineering team.
The successful candidate will design, build, and maintain scalable backend systems that power modern web applications.
This role is suited for a developer who can work independently on features while collaborating closely with frontend developers, product managers, and DevOps teams.
Key Responsibilities
- Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Ruby on Rails.
- Build and optimize RESTful APIs to support frontend and third-party integrations.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code following established engineering practices.
- Design database schemas and optimize queries for performance and scalability.
- Participate in architectural discussions and technical decision-making.
- Debug production issues and implement reliable solutions.
- Collaborate with frontend developers to deliver end-to-end features.
- Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers when needed.
Required Qualifications
- 3+ years of professional software development experience.
- Strong proficiency in Ruby and the Ruby on Rails framework.
- Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs.
- Solid understanding of relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL.
- Familiarity with MVC architecture and object-oriented programming principles.
- Experience using Git in a collaborative development environment.
- Understanding of web security best practices.
Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with background job systems (Sidekiq, Resque, or similar).
- Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
- Experience with Docker or containerized deployments.
- Knowledge of automated testing frameworks such as RSpec.
- Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows.
Soft Skills
- Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.
- Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly.
- Comfortable working in agile development environments.
- Proactive mindset and ownership of assigned features.
What You’ll Gain
- Opportunity to work on scalable production systems.
- Collaboration with a supportive and experienced engineering team.
- Professional growth through challenging technical projects.
- Exposure to modern backend architecture and cloud infrastructure.
